context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual indicator of Echo sleeping, classic sleep symbol
context.screen_position: Spawns above-right of Echo at (75, 50), floats upward
context.usage_scenario: Spawns during sleep state. ZZZ text floats upward every 2 seconds. Indicates Echo is sleeping and cannot be interacted with.

animation.description: Spawns above-right of Echo, floats upward at 5px/second, fades after 2 seconds. Spawns every 2 seconds during sleep.

visual_specification.details: Letter 'Z': 3x3px purple (#7E2553) text. Spawn position: above-right of Echo at (75, 50). Movement: floats upward slowly at 5px/second. Lifespan: 2 seconds. Fade: last 0.5 seconds. Spawn rate: every 2 seconds during sleep. Only 1 Z visible at a time (slow spawn rate).

relationships.differences_from: note_particle: Z vs note, sleeping vs singing, purple vs yellow, slower spawn rate. heart_particle: text vs icon, sleep vs affection.

explicit_negations: Not multiple Z's forming 'ZZZ' (single Z only)
Z does not grow or shrink
